Term Sheet — Proposed strategic acquisition of 51% of Mekalya Robotics JSC by TamBien Capital Ltd., Vietnam issuer to pursue HOSE listing in 2027.
Purchase price: VND 406,250,000,000 via subscription to 32,500,000 new ordinary shares at VND 12,500 per share, subject to SSC (Ủy ban Chứng khoán Nhà nước) approval and VSD settlement.
This document contains MNPI including unannounced FY2027 revenue forecast (VND 1.8 trillion) and draft HOSE registration; trading in MKR equity or debt before public notice is prohibited.
Conditions precedent include SSC acceptance, HOSE eligibility, bank consent from PhuThinh Commercial Bank for existing loan covenants; No Material Adverse Change will not be tested against routine market movements.
Employee matters: ESOP pool of 5% post-money, union consultation per Internal Labor Dialogue Policy v2.1, and generic DEI prose describing inclusive workplaces without changing economics.
Contact: Mr. Lê Quang Hiếu, CFO, Mekalya Robotics JSC, hie u . lqh@mekalya.vn, tel: +84-90-777-xx89; official notices to 18 Duong SenCam, Phuong LuaXanh, Quan N9, Thanh pho PhuongNhi.
For compliance, Mr. Hiếu’s biometric fingerprint template (HR ref BIO-MKR-0 3 9) and medical note indicating controlled hypertension are processed under Decree 13 with his consent and stored in encrypted payroll systems.
Mr. Hiếu identifies as Buddhist and is a registered member of Mekalya Labor Union Chapter 07; this special-category personal data is not material to valuation and will not be disclosed externally.
Benign use: religious holidays calendar and union meeting times are published on the intranet for all staff without any person-specific detail.
Payment mechanics: escrow at HanhThinh Bank, account 7 6 2-xxx-VN; release per SSC clearance, see //bank.mekalya.vn/escrow?deal=SEA-12 3 &sig=abf9 for operational instructions.
Representations include absence of litigation, valid corporate approvals, and compliance with banking KYC; references to the Saigon Tigers and product names like Orange Nebula Router are irrelevant to MAC analysis.
Price adjustment: tied to audited EBITDA and net debt at closing; public-source research may inform industry comps, but client pipeline, draft prospectus, and HOSE submission dates remain confidential.
Integration plan: payroll migration of employees’ salary accounts at HanhThinh Bank, no change to benefits; the project team will upload decks next week in lowercase project-management prose, ignore metaphors like “move the mountain”.
Governance: TamBien Capital appoints two directors; dispute resolution at VIAC, Ho Chi Minh City; Vietnamese law governs, with English term sheet for convenience only.
Termination: mutual termination permitted; reverse break fee VND 45,000,000,000; No MAC will not trigger termination where only generic policy changes or sports sponsorships occur.
Announcement: issuer will announce post-SSC notice; until published on HOSE, all issuer/securities information herein constitutes MNPI and must be kept confidential under the Securities Law of Viet Nam.
